query:
-- Last 7 pipeline runs — Apollo credits used and step outcomes
SELECT 
  DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000)) as runDate,
  status,
  apolloCreditsUsed,
  LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[11].status'), 20) as step12_gapfill,
  LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[11].note'), 80) as step12_note,
  LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[12].status'), 20) as step13_backfill,
  LEFT(JSON_EXTRACT(steps, '$[12].note'), 80) as step13_note
FROM pipelineRuns
ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 7;
